description: 147 passengers and crew begin a South Atlantic wildlife expedition.
Dutch national dies. Remains held in Saint Helena pending repatriation.
Close contact of index case collapses on Airlink flight. WHO traces 82 passengers and 6 crew.
NICD South Africa confirms hantavirus via PCR. British national in ICU Johannesburg.
German passenger dies on board. Ship anchors off Praia; Cape Verde.
Two labs independently confirm Andes virus.
Suspected 9th case tests negative; cluster stays at 8.
Disembarkation begins at Granadilla port. First repatriation flight departs for Madrid.

event: French and American passengers test positive
description: Cluster rises to 10 cases. French passenger deteriorates in Paris; 17 Americans evaluated at UNMC National Quarantine Unit in Omaha. WHO formalises 42-day monitoring recommendation.
